title.zh: 演算法工程師｜AI / Computer Vision / Automation

summary.zh: 北科大自動化科技碩士，專長深度學習、影像辨識與工業 AOI 系統落地。具備從模型訓練、推論優化到跨部門工程驗證的完整實作經驗，能把演算法轉成可量化、可部署的解決方案。
summary.en: Automation Technology M.S. (NTUT) specializing in deep learning, computer vision, and industrial AOI delivery. Experienced from model training and inference optimization to cross-functional validation—turning algorithms into measurable, deployable systems.

bullets.zh: 開發 Python 自動化與跨平台資料轉譯，涵蓋 API Schema Mapping、SKU 屬性整理與非結構化資料轉換
bullets.en: Built Python automation and cross-platform data translation for API schema mapping, SKU attribute processing, and unstructured data conversion

bullets.zh: 依 ROI、流量成本與商品條件設計規則型邏輯，支援自動化篩選、排序與資源分配
bullets.en: Designed rule-based logic using ROI, traffic cost, and product conditions to support automated filtering, ranking, and resource allocation

bullets.zh: 導入 Git、例外處理與日誌追蹤，提升無人值守腳本的穩定性與可維護性
bullets.en: Improved unattended script reliability with Git version control, exception handling, and log tracking

title.zh: 車用 LED 元件研發工程師（研替）

company.zh: 億光電子工業股份有限公司

bullets.zh: 導入 Top Contact 散熱與新晶片架構，達成體積縮小 15%、亮度提升 10%，並完成車用信賴性驗證
bullets.en: Implemented top-contact thermal path and new die design, achieving 15% volume reduction and 10% brightness gain while completing automotive reliability validation

bullets.zh: 依 APQP / AEC-Q 管控專案節點，協作品保與製程縮短驗證時程
bullets.en: Managed APQP/AEC-Q gates and coordinated QA/process partners to shorten validation cycles

company.zh: 群光電能科技股份有限公司

bullets.zh: 開發深孔加工治具抑制震動與飄移，治具成本降低 20%
bullets.en: Developed deep-bore fixtures to suppress vibration and drift, cutting jig cost by 20%

bullets.zh: 與研發進行 DFM 評估並優化加工路徑，誤差率下降 30%
bullets.en: Partnered with R&D on DFM reviews and tool-path optimization, lowering error rate by 30%

name.zh: PCB 混合動力瑕疵檢測系統

bullets.zh: 整合規則式 ROI 定位與深度學習分類，於工業 IPC 環境達成低延遲、高精度檢測，無需高階 GPU
bullets.en: Combined rule-based ROI localization with DL classification for low-latency, high-accuracy inspection on industrial IPCs without high-end GPUs

bullets.zh: CV Engine 於 10ms 內完成 ROI 定位，節省約 80% AI 推論算力；OpenVINO INT8 優化 Intel CPU 推論
bullets.en: CV engine localized ROI in <10ms, cutting ~80% AI inference cost; OpenVINO INT8 optimized Intel CPU inference

bullets.zh: DL Engine 支援 6 類疵點分類；導入 Pytest 與 CI 確保演算法迭代穩定
bullets.en: DL engine classifies 6 defect types; Pytest + CI keep algorithm iterations stable

name.zh: 資料中心冷卻節能優化

bullets.zh: 以 DE-MRBFNN + NSGA3 建立氣冷單元式資料中心節能模型，實驗環境降低 7% PUE
bullets.en: Built DE-MRBFNN + NSGA3 energy model for an air-cooled modular data center, cutting PUE by 7% in experiments

bullets.zh: 將 CFD 模擬耗時由數小時降至秒級，並以研討會論文發表成果
bullets.en: Reduced CFD simulation runtime from hours to seconds; published in a peer-reviewed symposium

name.zh: Anime4K C# 影像強化工具

bullets.zh: 實作 Anime4K 核心演算法與 WinForms 即時參數調校介面，強化動漫風格邊緣與質感
bullets.en: Implemented Anime4K core algorithm with WinForms live tuning for anime-style edge and texture enhancement

bullets.zh: 以 LockBits 直接操作記憶體優化 CPU 效能，支援 Scale／Strength／迭代參數即時調整
bullets.en: Used LockBits for CPU-efficient memory access; real-time Scale/Strength/iteration controls

degree.zh: 自動化科技研究所 碩士

note.zh: 氣冷資料中心多目標節能模型（DE-MRBFNN + NSGA3），PUE 降低 7%，研討會論文發表
note.en: Multi-objective data-center energy model (DE-MRBFNN + NSGA3); 7% PUE reduction; symposium paper

note.zh: 機構與製造基礎，支撐後續電／光／熱與系統整合跨域工作
note.en: Mechanical/manufacturing foundation supporting later electrical, optical, thermal, and system-integration work
